name: Golden war spirit
short_description: This is a very good fighting game that offers great value for money! I hope everyone can give me some support and encouragement!
detailed_description:
In the dark ages of ancient times, greed, selfishness, and arrogance reached their peak due to humanity! Therefore, awaken the power of darkness! The 108 demon stars in the demon world have finally been awakened! They will rule this era with darkness, terror, and death, and eliminate all foolish humans! The world is in danger! But there are still some kind-hearted and peace loving people who have not surrendered. Whenever darkness falls, there will be some golden warriors of light and justice who will save the world! They always have strong spiritual strength and an unyielding will to fight! Even if you're in pieces, you still have to fight against demons! In order to maintain world harmony, they sacrificed their precious lives first! Finally, the world has regained peace!

This game is a dual personality game. Both single and double players can play.

The artificial intelligence in the game is quite powerful! Are you sure you will win?

Player 1 (wsad) up and down movement (jkluioeq) is an attack jump blocking skill

Player 2 (keyboard directional keys) moves up and down (0.123456), which is an attack blocking skill.

Golden Soul "is a magnificent action fighting game with a golden style, where players engage in life and death duels, superpowers, boxing, and time control at lightning fast speeds, unleashing their potential in gorgeous, ruthless, crazy, and painful battles.

Unique and outstanding battles: Defeat opponents in various situations, experience passion in battles, fully unleash your potential, and unleash different skills with various combinations of keys.

Artificial Intelligence: Everyone is designed with various combat intelligence. The enemy has great power and wisdom. They were endowed with combat wisdom. You can use creativity and flexibility to solve enemies one by one.

Secret: There are many secrets and surprises waiting for you to explore in the game!
